arts.ttl: La Liga giants to battle Barcelona for Luis Diaz in 2025
arts.sum: Liverpool star Luis Diaz could be on the move this summer with Barcelona putting him top of their list of potential transfer targets. La Blaugrana are expected to prioritise a new attacker in the coming months and Diaz is an option as a marquee signing to bolster Hansi Flick’s team. Barcelona will have the funds to […] The post La Liga giants to battle Barcelona for Luis Diaz in 2025 appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Barcelona confirm sale of Vitor Roque to Palmeiras
arts.sum: Barcelona complete the sale of striker Vitor Roque to Palmeiras.

arts.ttl: What to look out for as Barcelona take on Real Sociedad in La Liga
arts.sum: When it comes to scoring, Barcelona will be worth watching from set-pieces against Real Sociedad as it’s become a feature of their play under Flick this season. Goals can be expected too as Barca have scored in each of their last 37 home matches against La Real in La Liga and haven’t drawn a blank for a very long time/

arts.sum: Barcelona and Bayer Leverkusen apparently enter the race for increasingly in-demand goalkeeper Joan Garcia, also linked with Arsenal and Manchester United.
